# aeo-demo-beauty

## Project
AEO (AI Engine Optimization) demo template for the beauty industry using HTML with Schema.org, llms.txt, FAQ, and AI-friendly markup.

## Conventions
- Use semantic HTML5 elements
- Include Schema.org structured data in JSON-LD format
- Maintain clean, readable indentation (2 spaces)
- Add AI-friendly meta tags and structured data
- Use descriptive comments for complex sections

## Naming
- Use kebab-case for file names (e.g., `beauty-faq.html`)
- Use lowercase for directory names
- Keep class names descriptive and semantic

## Architecture
- Single HTML files for each page type (index, faq, about)
- JSON-LD schema blocks embedded in `<script type="application/ld+json">`
- llms.txt for AI crawler optimization
- FAQ structured with proper Schema.org Question/Answer markup

## Commands
- No build commands required—pure HTML/CSS/JS
- Validate structured data with Google's Rich Results Test

## Do Not
- Do not use client-side frameworks unnecessarily
- Do not omit Schema.org markup on content pages
- Do not use generic or non-semantic class names
- Do not skip AI-friendly meta tags
